{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/svyazi-2-0/ensembles/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Ансамбли проектов

_Файлов:_ 8

h2. Содержание

* [A-collaboration-os.md|A-collaboration-os.md] — 
* [B-forensic-rag.md|B-forensic-rag.md] — 
* [C-multi-agent-factory.md|C-multi-agent-factory.md] — 
* [D-voice-first-mesh.md|D-voice-first-mesh.md] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [E-execution-plane.md|E-execution-plane.md] — 
* [F-evidence-backed-intake.md|F-evidence-backed-intake.md] — 
* [G-federated-local-graph.md|G-federated-local-graph.md] — 
* [H-research-to-product-flywheel.md|H-research-to-product-flywheel.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/svyazi-2-0/components/README.md] (сходство 0.19)
* [README|docs/ai-collaborations/ensembles/README.md] (сходство 0.19)
* [README|docs/ai-collaborations/candidates/README.md] (сходство 0.16)
